title: Asset tracking
description: Build a customizable asset tracking system with AI and NocoBase. Connect coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode to NocoBase and use natural language to generate asset tag lookup, barcode scanning, checkout and return, asset transfers, current location, current holder, and movement records — not just a prototype, but a customizable, reliable, and continuously evolvable asset tracking system.
description_cn: 使用 AI 和 NocoBase 搭建可定制的资产追踪系统。将 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、OpenCode 等 Coding Agent 接入 NocoBase 后，可用自然语言生成资产标签查询、扫码识别、领用归还、资产转移、当前位置、当前持有人和移动记录，不只是生成原型，而是构建可定制、可靠、可长期迭代的资产追踪系统。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Asset Tracking: checkout / return flows with a location timeline. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/09-asset-tracking.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 资产追踪:领用/归还流程和位置时间线。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型:https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/09-asset-tracking.html
